creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
You have to experience the Japanese solo dining concept @ichiryuramenhouse! ❤️

There’s a regular dining hall, but we specifically visited this ramen house for its solo booths. Good for me who wants a ramen treat and has to avoid the crowd. 

What we had:
Takoyaki: 22 AED
Aka Paitan (Red Ramen): 60 AED special
Kuro Paitan (Black Ramen): 48 AED regular 
Red Iced Tea: 15 AED 

We looove the broth of both ramen. Thick and flavorful! We opted for the normal local noodles and it’s quite soft for our liking. No, we didn’t film that long. 😄 We will try the thin imported noodles next time. 

Save for your solo date or tag your ramen lover friends! 🍜
